subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto them that have believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, that the verses may draw them unto the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من آمن بالله العزیز العلیم لتجذبه الایات الی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity
